SYNTHETIC END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT
=====================================
THIS IS A FAKE EULA FOR TESTING PURPOSES ONLY.
IT GRANTS NO REAL RIGHTS AND IMPOSES NO REAL OBLIGATIONS.

1. LICENSE GRANT. You are hereby granted a pretend, non-exclusive license.
2. RESTRICTIONS. Don't pretend to ship real software with this fixture.
3. DISCLAIMER. THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" FOR TESTING ONLY.
4. TERMINATION. This fake agreement terminates when the test suite stops.

BY CLICKING "ACCEPT" IN A TEST, YOU AGREE TO NOTHING REAL.

Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. (SYNTHETIC — NOT A REAL LEGAL ENTITY FOR THIS FILE)
